appliedUpdates.description: Added terminal CLI flow-validator guidance for cli-core, including deterministic mix-run wrapper usage and unique process-name isolation for repeated CLI runs.

frictions.description: Deterministic CLI validation required a temporary `mix run` wrapper script so the supported `:cli_overrides` runtime surface could inject anonymous-function doubles and unique supervisor names per run.
frictions.resolution: Executed every assertion through `mix run --no-start --no-compile <temp-runner>.exs -- review ...` with isolated temp repos and per-run names, without modifying repository source files.

frictions.description: The current override validation surface is runtime-env driven (`Application.put_env(:cerberus_elixir, :cli_overrides, ...)`) instead of a cleaner first-class CLI flag/file surface.
frictions.resolution: Used deterministic `mix run --no-start --no-compile` wrappers that set `:cli_overrides` before invoking the CLI and direct `Cerberus.Config.start_link/1` snapshot/preflight helpers for evidence generation.
